title: SciNote troubleshooting protocol

steps: 5 mL pull out 5mL and dispense into pH cup

pH Meter (Mettler Toledo, N/A, https://www.mt.com/us/en/home/products/Laboratory_Analytics_Browse/pH-meter.html?cmp=sea_05010127&SE=GOOGLE&Campaign=MT_ANA-pH_EN_US&Adgroup=pH+Meter+-+Exact&bookedkeyword=ph%20meter&matchtype=e&adtext=435285008761&placement=&network=g&kclid=_k_EAIaIQobCh , https://s3.amazonaws.com/protocols-files/files/de2nbghg7.jpeg ) calibrate pH meter
measure pH sample and record in the results section
